ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with XYZ Airlines. We are pleased to confirm your flight details:

- Passenger: John Doe
- Flight: ABC123
- Date: 2026-04-15
- Departure: New York (JFK) at 08:30 AM
- Arrival: London (LHR) at 08:00 PM
- Seat: 12A
- Cabin: Economy
- Check‑in: 30 minutes before departure, available online from <URL>

Please make sure to arrive at the gate at least 45 minutes before departure.

If you need to change your reservation or have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

We wish you a pleasant journey!

Best regards,
XYZ Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Valued Microsoft 365 User,

This is a security alert from Microsoft. Your Microsoft 365 account password will expire in 24 hours. Failure to update your password before the expiry date will result in temporary account lockout.

To reset your password, please click the link below:
<URL>

After resetting your password, you will be required to verify your account using the same link. Please complete the process within the next 24 hours to avoid any disruption of service.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Microsoft Security Team
